tools.name: categories.getAccountCategory
tools.description: Get category for specific nominal account.

tools.name: categories.listAccountsCategories
tools.description: Lists suggested and confirmed chart of account categories for the given company and data connection.

tools.name: categories.listAvailableAccountCategories
tools.description: Lists available account categories Codat's categorisation engine can provide.

tools.name: categories.updateAccountCategory
tools.description: Update category for a specific nominal account

tools.name: categories.updateAccountsCategories
tools.description: Comfirms the categories for all or a batch of accounts for a specific connection.

tools.name: dataIntegrity.getDataIntegrityDetails
tools.description: Gets record-by-record match results for a given company and datatype, optionally restricted by a Codat query string.

tools.name: dataIntegrity.getDataIntegrityStatus
tools.description: Gets match status for a given company and datatype.

tools.name: dataIntegrity.getDataIntegritySummaries
tools.description: Gets match summary for a given company and datatype, optionally restricted by a Codat query string.

tools.name: excelReports.downloadExcelReport
tools.description: Download the previously generated Excel report to a local drive.

tools.name: excelReports.generateExcelReport
tools.description: Generate an Excel report which can subsequently be downloaded.

tools.name: excelReports.getAccountingMarketingMetrics
tools.description: Request an Excel report for download.

tools.name: excelReports.getExcelReport
tools.description: Download the previously generated Excel report to a local drive.

tools.name: excelReports.getExcelReportGenerationStatus
tools.description: Returns the status of the latest report requested.

tools.name: reports.getAccountsForEnhancedBalanceSheet
tools.description:
The Enhanced Balance Sheet Accounts endpoint returns a list of categorized accounts that appear on a company’s Balance Sheet along with a balance per financial statement date.

Codat suggests a category for each account automatically, but you can [change it](/docs/assess-categorizing-accounts-ecommerce-lending) to a more suitable one.

tools.name: reports.getAccountsForEnhancedProfitAndLoss
tools.description:
The Enhanced Profit and Loss Accounts endpoint returns a list of categorized accounts that appear on a company’s Profit and Loss. It also includes a balance per the financial statement date.

Codat suggests a category for each account automatically, but you can [change it](/docs/assess-categorizing-accounts-ecommerce-lending) to a more suitable one.

tools.name: reports.getCommerceCustomerRetentionMetrics
tools.description: Gets the customer retention metrics for a specific company connection, over one or more periods of time.

tools.name: reports.getCommerceLifetimeValueMetrics
tools.description: Gets the lifetime value metric for a specific company connection, over one or more periods of time.

tools.name: reports.getCommerceOrdersMetrics
tools.description: Gets the order information for a specific company connection, over one or more periods of time.

tools.name: reports.getCommerceRefundsMetrics
tools.description: Gets the refunds information for a specific company connection, over one or more periods of time.

tools.name: reports.getCommerceRevenueMetrics
tools.description: Get the revenue and revenue growth for a specific company connection, over one or more periods of time.

tools.name: reports.getEnhancedBalanceSheet
tools.description: Gets a fully categorized balance sheet statement for a given company, over one or more period(s).

tools.name: reports.getEnhancedCashFlowTransactions
tools.description: The Enhanced Cash Flow Transactions endpoint provides a fully categorized list of banking transactions for a company. Accounts and transaction data are obtained from the company's banking data sources.

tools.name: reports.getEnhancedFinancialMetrics
tools.description: Gets all the available financial metrics for a given company, over one or more periods.

tools.name: reports.getEnhancedInvoicesReport
tools.description: Gets a list of invoices linked to the corresponding banking transaction

tools.name: reports.getEnhancedProfitAndLoss
tools.description: Gets a fully categorized profit and loss statement for a given company, over one or more period(s).

tools.name: reports.getRecurringRevenueMetrics
tools.description: Gets key metrics for subscription revenue.

tools.name: reports.requestRecurringRevenueMetrics
tools.description: Request production of key subscription revenue metrics.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
